results.title: Nyara Sabally scores career-high 29 and the Tempo beat the Sky 111-104
results.description: Nyara Sabally scored a career-high 29 points, Marina Mabrey had 24 points and seven assists, and the Toronto Tempo beat the Chicago Sky 111-104.

results.title: Nyara Sabally scores career-high 29 and the Tempo beat the Sky 111-104
results.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Nyara Sabally scored a career-high 29 points, Marina Mabrey had 24 points and seven assists, and the Toronto Tempo beat the Chicago Sky 111-104 on Wednesday night.
